author: Ahmad Dan-Hamidu
review: This app is gravely FLAWED: it's often impossible to "back-out" of the app to the phone's desktop or even to jump to another running app in the background. Also, when the user's login session expires, there is no visible prompt to login again, even if the app has been force-stopped at the Android level. This has left the app useless to me!

author: Matt Don
review: If there were a provision for zero star I would have given it to them. I can now see that the so called "positive" reviews highlighted here are no more than a hoarded hoax. I've had this application for over 5 months now and I still can't open the application for the first time because of the utterly insidious facial verification. Over 5 months! I mean couldn't you rather get a developer who truly knows his job not one that's inexperienced and greedy at the same time. Deserves Zero star

author: Adegoke Bolarinwa
review: This app is Extremely wonderful as it shows the NIN slip as our National ID. One challenge I have with it is the fact that I can't take screenshots of my ID, front or back to be used for verifications. I've been to the NIN office multiple times and I've not been given the plastic card. I've had my NIN done since 2014, this is 2026 and still no plastic card is available to be distributed? that's sad. at least please ! allow us take screenshots. please!

author: Bilqees Galadima
review: Was unable to complete the verification process as it kept failing after inputting my NIN. I reported this about 6 months ago and never got a response. Deleted and reinstalled the app to try again today. I got past the NIN input stage and it failed at the face verification stage even though all the face shots were approved. I hate buggy apps with no clear troubleshooting channels.

author: Success Dumnebari (Heaven 天)
review: I was asked to snap my National ID Card (NIN) but it's required to have to parts, front and back but the NIN has only a front with no bar code at the back. The slip is not even accepted internationally, then what's the use na? Login into the app, this one that somehow looks genuine, there's no way to print out the card, qr code changes every second if I'm to snap with someone else's phone Nigeria, why na?

author: Lydia Egbaji
review: The app is cool. However, I downloaded the app but it couldn't verify my NIN. So my sis used it and it verified her NIN. Later when I cleared issues with my NIN, it's been linked to my sister's NIN even after uninstalling to re-installing, it's still not acknowledging my NIN. The message is "This device is linked to another NIN" and it's my phone

author: burning weed
review: Yeah it works just fine, however you can't screenshot anything on the app, and bonus tip. If you have small or narrow eyes. You're going to have to do the whole verification part with your eyes wide open that is the only way.

author: Esta Kalu
review: difficult app. i have no idea why it exists, outdoors or indoors it gives the same error "unable to confirm identity". ive used 2 different phones for months. really frustrating. not user friendly at all.

author: Patrick Eze
review: this app is a mess and should be designated an "app of a particular concern". face verification never works even after switching backgrounds in a well lit up environment. I have tried for several days all to no avail, NIMC should bring back the MWS app if they are not ready to update this thrash called NINAUTH.

author: David Oluwaseyi
review: absolutely horrible... I've been seeing complaints about the facial recognition feature on the reviews for months and till now it has not been tended to when I finally decided to use the app... why did you guys even put such a feature there in the first place as a gateway to use the app if it wouldn't be done right? and then I see the reviewers being referred to a website instead of you lot fixing whatsoever bug your face recognition API has... such nonsense, a basic reg will still stress you

author: Blessing erasmus
review: Please am I the only one struggling with facial verification. This feels so frustrating, over hours I can't be verified. Can the developer of this app look into the facial verification, this is the only app I have had to struggle this long and yet no success. It's so sad.

author: Hobi squishy
review: facial recognition doesnt work. scanning the qrcode on the paper slip doesn't work. what is the use of the app if we can't even get past the first phase? Everyone giving this a 5 star gotta be lying

author: Innocent Iduh
review: I've been trying to link my phone number to this app for several days now, but without success. They gave me four minutes to receive an OTP code, but nothing arrived, and this has happened repeatedly.

author: opeyemi adediran
review: Useless app. Can't complete face verification after many attempts. Even when the app gives a green tick indicating successful capturing of face from all angles. Why must everything about Nigeria be stressful? Ṣ'ogun l'aiye ni?

author: Joseph Afasinu
review: I read those comment and I was almost discouraged to download but I just thought trying myself and it worked at my first trial... just imputed my nin, it captured my face standing right in front of the window not even outside... so all good here

author: Ash-Shu'ara Salman
review: Please kindly fixed the facial recognition aspect of the registration. For days, it has been difficult to get my facial recognition done.

author: Apollos ishaku
review: this is simple and straightforward but I try to modify my LGA of origin but couldn't find the interface for it and I will recommend that it should be added too

author: Dania Yinka
review: what is the matter again ...after the update..the app confirmed face with green mark and suddenly say.."unable to verify your identity " is this a bug. or my face disappeared in ur data base . I dont understand this unfinished app.

author: Abanonu Osinachi
review: for one day, I've not been able to login to the app. kept getting invalid credentials. Even on password reset. same error message

author: olawale sodeeq
review: I love this app. It took some time before I could successfully log in but it works perfectly after. I wish the printing of slip could be made available on this app as well.

author: Mary Akins
review: I couldn't get pass the login page, the app wont verify my face, it wont pass the "dont wear hats, glasses or masks" option. my face was 100٪ clear

author: Timothy John
review: I think everything works smoothly whenever there's good internet connection. I'd like to add that, the share feature to help one print out the slip and/or the card would be a good addition to this app. Overall, it's been good.

author: Shalom Obaraye
review: the app looks very nice at first but the first time I actually needed the app I couldn't take a screenshot pleas allow us to take screenshots

author: Muhammed - VantageAI Sales
review: Why isn't the printout mode available on here the official portal is always down so this is our only option. We have to wait till the website is back online. Please fix this

author: muhammadbello yakubu
review: "The user interface is very friendly and easy to navigate. This is by far the best way to handle NIN-related issues. Great job to the developers!"😍🙏💯

author: ADEDIRAN EMMANUEL
review: Nice app, but they should make a swift way to get it delivered at doorsteps or pick up zone

author: Chukwuemeka Andre Ozomma
review: I have never been so frustrated in my life. Facial recognition, despite standing in the sun where everywhere is lit, failed and the app kept telling me to move to hell before it can be successful since the sun is not bright enough for it. Using QR-Code failed instantly. This app doesn't even deserve a star from me, tbh.

author: Olajire Tolani
review: The app is good, Although O just started using it and the login phase was smooth. I guess the review of other previous users have have been rectified. But my issue is with the scan to share ID, it's not working at all. and I O needed it urgently. please kindly work on it

author: okpani ogwu
review: Very fast and reliable. I also love the new features like encryption and approval by the card holder.

author: igbinoba osaro
review: This app is terrible! my face is hurting me now. I've moved my face to the left, right, up and down for a long time now and yet it's still unsuccessful! This app is extremely frustrating. I don't know why the govt can't get something as simple as face verification right.

author: Ikya Ferdinand
review: Never experienced such a frustrating app as this before. I have used the brightest light in my room, yet it keeps saying your your face can't be captured. try again without end. the developers of this app need to do more to enhance its functionality.

author: Caleb Dele
review: Before with the NIMC app I could download the card so that I could print it out as a plastic card, but with this app that feels impossible. Making this app almost worthless. Like how do I get a physical card now?🤦🏾‍♂️

author: Onwuziligbo Raphael chinaza
review: I'm trying to create 6digit code for my nin account it's showing error occurs try again, I tried several times still saying the same

author: Oladipo Godwin
review: This is the most frustrating App I've seen lately. Imagine battling with face verification for over an hour with no success. Nothing managed by the government has ever been seamless. As if one does not have any productive activities to focus on.

author: gulla sunday
review: very bad experience, can't check my digital nin card. unlike nimc mws that was a perfect app ever

author: Michael Elozino
review: good app, I didn't have issues signing up, the sign up was quick and easy

author: A Mercy
review: I'm having issues concluding on my facial recognition. I keep turning up and both sides, it confirms okay with the correct sign but ends up saying try again as it fails.

author: Adedotun Moses
review: An absolute waste of time of an app. . scan QR does not work and please when you share that code with organizations what are they supposed to do with it. while I understand the need to keep data closed, I don't think life getting and using your NIN should be this hard.

author: ibrahim muhammed
review: The system doesn't have refreshing option for one to update his/her details after modification unlike the previous app. For instance I made a change of my photo which has reflected already but on the app is still showing the previous photo. please amend it

author: Master Okwukwe Nwoje
review: After i read all the review before download, i was already convinced it won't work until i downloaded on my iPhone, Yes it didn't function because the homage was just static n stagnant!!! so i used my Android and in 5mins i was done?!!! hopefully this helps someone! udo
